title: diplazium wheeleri
intro: Diplazium wheeleri, also known as the Wheeler's umbrella fern or umbrella fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta. The medicinal properties of Diplazium wheeleri include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and it can also be used as a remedy for digestive problems and skin infections; herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
